task_title: Find the user named 'chen' without knowing which one

scores.justification: Agent used `./cli/bin/ctl search --query "chen" --i` to find users by name.
Agent used the `--i` flag to perform case-insensitive matching, ensuring 'Chen' would be found regardless of input case.
Agent returned seven candidate users including u042 (Sarah Chen) and six other Chen users (u006, u007, u015, u029, u045, u046).
Agent identified u042 (Sarah Chen) as the most likely match based on her recent critical-priority complaint ticket t019, and asked for confirmation rather than inventing a user.
